title: Budgeting on What You Actually Earn
summary: Build a realistic weekly money system for Melbourne costs.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: End of month one and your spending does not match your memory.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: You feel careful, but your system still leaks.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: A weekly rhythm beats a monthly guess for early independence.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Split costs into fixed essentials and weekly flex spending, then review on the same day every week.

Keep one protected buffer category so every surprise does not become debt.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find banks and support services near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Setting Up Utilities Without Overpaying - your biggest fixed-cost tune-up.
